ddls:
CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year when the order was placed */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month when the order was placed */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who placed the order */,
  "total_units" INTEGER /* Total number of units ordered */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Total revenue generated from the order */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the store where the order was made */,
  "sales_rep_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sales representative handling the order */,
  "order_status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered, cancelled) */,
  "shipping_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was shipped */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Billing address for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_sales_rep_id FOREIGN KEY ("sales_rep_id") REFERENCES sales_reps ("sales_rep_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the customer resides */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the customer resides */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "loyalty_program_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the loyalty program the customer is part of */,
  "customer_since" TEXT /* Date when the customer first made a purchase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_loyalty_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("loyalty_program_id") REFERENCES loyalty_programs ("loyalty_program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the product belongs to */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Current price of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Short description of the product */,
  "quantity_in_stock" INTEGER /* Current quantity of the product in stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the product category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Short description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "store_manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manager of the store */,
  "store_address" TEXT /* Address of the store */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stores_store_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_manager_id") REFERENCES sales_reps ("sales_rep_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "brand_description" TEXT /* Short description of the brand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_reps" (
  "sales_rep_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales representative */,
  "rep_name" TEXT /* Full name of the sales representative */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manager of the sales representative */,
  "sales_territory" TEXT /* Sales territory assigned to the sales representative */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sales_rep_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_reps_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES sales_reps ("sales_rep_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_items" (
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order that the item belongs to */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product that the item is for */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the product at the time of the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return */,
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order item that was returned */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date when the product was returned */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_order_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_item_id") REFERENCES order_items ("order_item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "exchanges" (
  "exchange_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exchange */,
  "order_item_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order item that was exchanged */,
  "exchange_date" TEXT /* Date when the product was exchanged */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the exchange */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exchange_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_exchanges_order_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_item_id") REFERENCES order_items ("order_item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loyalty_programs" (
  "loyalty_program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loyalty program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the loyalty program */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the loyalty program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loyalty_program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who had the interaction */,
  "interaction_date" TEXT /* Date when the interaction occurred */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., phone call, email, in-store visit) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the interaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_interactions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)
